scraped_name: Chanel Classic Red Caviar Quilted Medium Double Flap Gold HW Handbag
description: The Chanel Classic Red Caviar Quilted Medium handbag is a symbol of timeless beauty and luxury. It is made from high-quality red caviar leather, which is known for its durability and stylish texture. The quilted design adds a touch of elegance and makes it perfect for any occasion. Medium Size with Perfect Shape This medium-sized handbag measures 10 inches in length, 6 inches in height, and 3 inches in depth. It offers just the right amount of space to carry your daily essentials without being too bulky. Whether you are going out during the day or attending an evening event, this bag fits your style perfectly. Stylish Double Flap and Gold Hardware The bag features the iconic double flap design, which gives it a classic Chanel look. It has a ‘CC’ turnlock closure in gold hardware that not only looks elegant but also keeps your items secure. The gold accents match perfectly with the red leather for a chic finish. Adjustable Chain and Leather Straps The shoulder straps are a mix of chain links and leather loops, making them both stylish and comfortable to wear. The straps are adjustable, so you can carry the bag either on your shoulder or as a crossbody.
